name: ancientq
description: AncientQ — Ancient Principles, Quantum Frontiers. Interactive science reconstructions.

scripts.android:init: npx cap init ancientq com.ancientq.app --web-dir dist && npx cap add android
scripts.android:sync: vite build && npx cap sync android
scripts.android:run: vite build && npx cap sync android && npx cap run android
